title: Kubecost Budget
description: A recurring budget rule for controlling Kubernetes spending, with configurable thresholds and notification actions.

aggregation.description: The field used to scope the budget, such as namespace, cluster, or label.

filter.description: Filter expression to scope the budget to specific workloads.

actions.description: Alert actions triggered when budget thresholds are reached.

currentSpend.description: Current spend within the budget period.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the budget was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the budget was last updated.
